settings.window.title: Game Overlay Settings [ {0} ]
settings.plugin.title: Plugin Management
settings.plugin.subtitle: Enable or disable plugins. Enabled plugins get their own settings tab. Changes are saved automatically.
settings.status.title: Status
settings.status.subtitle: All settings (including plugins) are saved automatically when you close the overlay or hide it via {0}.
settings.language.title: Language
settings.language.label: UI Language
settings.language.tooltip: Controls GameHelper's main overlay text. Font glyph range is configured separately below.
settings.controls.title: Controls & Display
settings.filters.title: Filters & Tracking
settings.filters.subtitle: Advanced entity filters. Change zone or restart after edits.
settings.advanced.title: Advanced
settings.about.title: About
settings.about.scam: This is free software, if you purchased a copy you have been scammed
settings.about.offset: Offset updater is Arsenic, Nabeora, Lafko
settings.about.disclaimer: Developer of this software is not responsible for any loss that may happen due to the usage of this software. Use this software at your own risk.
settings.nearby.title: Nearby Monster Config
settings.font.title: Change Fonts
settings.font.universal: Universal Font (render any language across the whole overlay)
settings.font.universal.tooltip: Loads a bundled merged font (DejaVuSans + the font below + GNU Unifont over the whole Unicode BMP) so text in any language renders everywhere. The font below is still merged in as the priority for its language. Building the full atlas is heavier, so this is off by default.
settings.font.custom_glyph_ranges.toolti: This is advance level feature. Do not modify this if you don't know what you are doing. Example usage:- If you have downloaded and pointed to the ArialUnicodeMS.ttf font, you can use 0x0020, 0xFFFF, 0x00 text in this field to load all of the font texture in ImGui. Note the 0x00 as the last item in the range.
settings.poi.title: Special Monster Tracker (A.K.A Monster POI)
settings.poi.tooltip: In order to figure out the path/mod to add please open DV -> States -> InGameState -> CurrentAreaInstance -> Awake Entities -> click dump button against the entity you want to add. This will create a new file in entity_dumps folder with all mod names and path of that entity.
settings.common.restart_or_zone: Please restart gamehelper or change area/zone if you make any changes over here.
settings.common.path_match.tooltip: Path is going to be checked from left to right (i.e. String.StartsWith), up till the filter length.
settings.common.mod_match.tooltip: Mod name is fully checked, it need to be 100% match.
settings.ignore.title: Ignore Monsters
settings.ignore.tooltip: In order to figure out the path, please open DV -> States -> InGameState -> CurrentAreaInstance -> Awake Entities -> Click Path -> see NPC path in the game world
settings.npc.title: Special NPC Metadata Paths
settings.npc.tooltip: In order to figure out the path, please open DV -> States -> InGameState -> CurrentAreaInstance -> Awake Entities -> Click Path -> see NPC path in the game world
settings.object.title: Special Objects Metadata Paths
settings.object.tooltip: In order to figure out the path, please open DV -> States -> InGameState -> CurrentAreaInstance -> Awake Entities -> Click Path -> see objects path in the game world
settings.input.title: Input Config
settings.input.key_timeout.tooltip: When GameOverlay press a key in the game, the key has to go to the GGG server for it to work. This process takes time equal to your latency x 3. During this time GameOverlay might press that key again. Set the key timeout value to latency x 3 so this doesn't happen. e.g. for 30ms latency, set it to 90ms. Also, do not go below 60 (due to server ticks), no matter how good your latency is.
settings.tools.title: Misc Tools
settings.tools.hide_when_background: Hide when game is in background
settings.misc.title: Miscellaneous Config
settings.misc.disable_entity_processing: Disable entity processing when in town or hideout
settings.misc.fps_limiter.tooltip:
WARNING: There is no rate limiter in GameHelper, once V-Sync is off,
it's your responsibility to use external rate limiter e.g. NVIDIA Control Panel
-> Manage 3D Settings -> Set Max Framerate to what your monitor support.
settings.misc.process_all_renderable.too: WARNING: This will greatly reduce GH speed as well as increase crashes/glitches. Always keep it unchecked.
settings.misc.disable_debug_counters: Disable debug counters (do it on 6 man party + juiced maps only)
settings.misc.entity_max_degree.tooltip: This limits the entity reading algorithm to a set number of CPUs. Select -1 to disable this limit. Use Task Manager CPU usage stat + Misc Tools -> performance stats to figure out best FPS to CPU usage ratio.
settings.misc.entity_staleness.tooltip: These options help detect and fix stale entity data (e.g. NPCs that teleport but keep old position in memory).
settings.misc.enable_npc_cleanup.tooltip:
Include NPC entities in the removal logic when they go invalid.
Prevents stale NPC entities from lingering in the entity dictionary.
settings.misc.enable_stale_cleanup.toolt:
Remove any entity that stays invalid for many consecutive frames,
regardless of entity type. Catches NPCs and other entities that
the default cleanup misses.
settings.reload.title: Reload Plugin
settings.confirm.quit: Do you want to quit the GameHelper overlay?
overlay_killer.title: Player Vs Player (PVP) Detected
overlay_killer.message: Please don't cheat in PvP mode. GameHelper was not created for PvP cheating. Overlay will close in {0} seconds.
